data.title: Nuclear Stocks Soar As Amazon Becomes Latest Tech Giant To Invest In Nuclear Power
data.description: AWS, Amazon's cloud computing subsidiary, said it signed three new agreements on Wednesday to support the development of nuclear energy projects, including the construction of several new Small Modular Reactors (SMRs).
